items.title: The 5 stocks dragging down the Dow in 2025
items.description: UnitedHealth Group (UNH), Salesforce (CRM), Procter & Gamble (PG), Nike (NKE), and Honeywell (HON) are the worst performers of the Dow Jones Industrial Average (^DJI) in 2025. Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre examines the index's 2025 losers. Check out Yahoo Finance's examination of the Dow Jones Industrial Average's best performers of 2025. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.

items.title: 3 HMO Stocks in Focus Despite Rising Medical Costs, Regulatory Pressures
items.description: The Medical-HMO industry pursues growth through M&A and tech innovation, aided by easing interest rates, but faces headwinds from rising medical costs, regulatory shifts and a shortage of healthcare professionals. UNH, HUM and CNC are likely to navigate industry storms.

items.title: They made big money on risky trades in the market this year. Then they posted about it.
items.description: ‘I am 24 years old and just woke up to this’: Everyday traders have been sharing screenshots of big wins from crazy trades, exemplifying the nature of the markets in 2025.

items.title: BME: Monthly Income With Upside From The Out-Of-Favor Healthcare Sector
items.description: See why BlackRock Health Sciences Trust is a Buy for income investors, offering an 8% yield, NAV discount, and resilient healthcare exposure. Click for more on BME.

items.title: Jamie Dimon Warns AI Will Eliminate Jobs, But Says These Skills Will Help People Bag Plenty Of Jobs: 'You Can Earn Quite A Bit Of Money With Skills'
items.description: JPMorgan's Jamie Dimon says AI will eliminate some jobs but not trigger an immediate labor collapse, urging workers to focus on soft skills.
